Uses of Interface
com.hazelcast.config.ConfigRecognizer

  • Packages that use ConfigRecognizer 
    Package Description
    com.hazelcast.client.config
    Contains classes related to config for com.hazelcast.client
    com.hazelcast.config
    Provides classes for configuring HazelcastInstance.
    com.hazelcast.internal.config  

    • Uses of ConfigRecognizer in com.hazelcast.client.config

      Classes in com.hazelcast.client.config that implement ConfigRecognizer 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  ClientConfigRecognizer
      ConfigRecognizer implementation that recognizes Hazelcast client declarative configurations based on an extensible set of built-in ConfigRecognizer implementations.
      class  ClientFailoverConfigRecognizer
      ConfigRecognizer implementation that recognizes Hazelcast client failover declarative configurations based on an extensible set of built-in ConfigRecognizer implementations.
      Constructors in com.hazelcast.client.config with parameters of type ConfigRecognizer 
      Constructor and Description
      ClientConfigRecognizer(ConfigRecognizer... customRecognizers)
      Constructs an instance with the built-in set of ConfigRecognizer implementations extended with ones provided in customRecognizers.
      ClientFailoverConfigRecognizer(ConfigRecognizer... customRecognizers)
      Constructs an instance with the built-in set of ConfigRecognizer implementations extended with ones provided in customRecognizers.

    • Uses of ConfigRecognizer in com.hazelcast.config

      Classes in com.hazelcast.config that implement ConfigRecognizer 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  MemberConfigRecognizer
      ConfigRecognizer implementation that recognizes Hazelcast member declarative configurations based on an extensible set of built-in ConfigRecognizer implementations.
      Constructors in com.hazelcast.config with parameters of type ConfigRecognizer 
      Constructor and Description
      MemberConfigRecognizer(ConfigRecognizer... customRecognizers)
      Constructs an instance with the built-in set of ConfigRecognizer implementations extended with ones provided in customRecognizers.

    • Uses of ConfigRecognizer in com.hazelcast.internal.config

      Classes in com.hazelcast.internal.config with annotations of type with type parameters of type that implement declared as with annotations of type with type parameters of type with annotations of type with annotations of type with type parameters of type that return that return types with arguments of type with parameters of type with type arguments of type that throw with annotations of type with annotations of type with parameters of type with type arguments of type that throw ConfigRecognizer 
      Modifier and Type Class and Description
      class  com.hazelcast.internal.config.AbstractConfigRecognizer
      Abstract composite ConfigRecognizer implementation that uses multiple recognizers under the hood.
